span.p: tied to value floor, antivalue ceiling, metric, claim, milestone, phase, risk, or policy

span.p: offer addresses useful but undeclared material

span.p: reviewer or protocol accepts as equivalent, necessary, useful, or complementary

span.p: conflict, capture risk, duplication, or weak method
